team.title: Team
team.description: Manage your team members and permissions

invite.title: Invite Team Member
invite.description: Send an invitation email to add a new member to your team.
invite.successMessage: An invitation has been sent to {email}.

errors.duplicate: An active invite already exists for this email address.
errors.generic: Failed to send invite. Please try again.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

changeRole.title: Change Role
changeRole.description: Change the role of {name} on your team.
changeRole.selfWarning: You are changing your own role. You may lose admin access.
changeRole.lastAdminWarning: You are the last admin. Demoting yourself will leave the team without an admin.
changeRole.error: Failed to update role. Please try again.

removeMember.title: Remove Team Member
removeMember.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the team? This action cannot be undone.
removeMember.warning: They will lose access to all team resources immediately.
removeMember.selfError: You cannot remove yourself from the team.

permissions.adminOnly: Only admins can perform this action.
permissions.contactAdmin: Contact your admin to make changes.
permissions.readOnly: You have read-only access to this section.
